languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

languages.text: "Если вычленить лишь саму суть, то гальваническая батарея не только отдает Движущую Силу, но и позволяет мне забирать ее, а после — перераспределять туда, куда укажет воля Омниссии. Например, для пробуждения вашей реликвии мне пришлось обесточить один из не критических для производства малых цехов в обители Алтарь-Темплум".

"If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

languages.text: 「要点を絞らせて頂くと…この電気電池は単に動力源を提供するだけでなく、その動力を取り込み、どこへでも分配することができるのです。例えば、あなたの遺物に力を与えるには、アルター・テンプラムの非重要な小さな工房から電力を奪わなければなりませんでした」
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

languages.text: "Um es auf das Wesentliche zu reduzieren ... die galvanische Zelle erzeugt Antriebskraft und erlaubt mir, diese nach dem Willen des Omnissiah beliebig umzuverteilen. Um Euer Relikt zu erwecken, musste ich beispielsweise auf die Energie einer der unkritischen kleineren Werkstätten auf Altar-Templum zurückgreifen."
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: "Um es auf das Wesentliche zu reduzieren ... die galvanische Zelle erzeugt Antriebskraft und erlaubt mir, diese nach dem Willen des Omnissiah beliebig umzuverteilen. Um Euer Relikt zu erwecken, musste ich beispielsweise auf die Energie einer der unkritischen kleineren Werkstätten auf Altar-Templum zurückgreifen."

languages.text: «Si me permite una exposición somera de los fundamentos básicos... la célula galvánica no solo genera Fuerza Motriz, también me permite enjaezarla y redistribuirla siguiendo la voluntad del Omnissiah. Para despertar su reliquia, por ejemplo, he tenido que extraer energía de uno de los talleres menos esenciales de Altar-Templum».
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: «Si me permite una exposición somera de los fundamentos básicos... la célula galvánica no solo genera Fuerza Motriz, también me permite enjaezarla y redistribuirla siguiendo la voluntad del Omnissiah. Para despertar su reliquia, por ejemplo, he tenido que extraer energía de uno de los talleres menos esenciales de Altar-Templum».

languages.text: "En yalın özüne indirgemem gerekirse... Galvaniz hücre sadece Devinim Gücü vermekle kalmıyor, aynı zamanda onu alıp Hermesih'in iradesinin emrettiği yere yeniden dağıtmamı sağlıyor. Örneğin yadigârınızı uyandırmak için Altar-Templum'daki kritik olmayan küçük atölyelerden birinin gücünü çekmek zorunda kaldım."
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: "En yalın özüne indirgemem gerekirse... Galvaniz hücre sadece Devinim Gücü vermekle kalmıyor, aynı zamanda onu alıp Hermesih'in iradesinin emrettiği yere yeniden dağıtmamı sağlıyor. Örneğin yadigârınızı uyandırmak için Altar-Templum'daki kritik olmayan küçük atölyelerden birinin gücünü çekmek zorunda kaldım."

languages.text: « S'il me fallait résumer ce procédé à sa plus simple expression... la cellule galvanique ne fournit pas seulement la Force Motrice, mais me permet également de l'emmagasiner puis de la redistribuer là où la volonté de l'Omnimessie l’exige. Pour réveiller votre relique, par exemple, j'ai puisé de l'énergie de l'un des ateliers non essentiels d'Altar-Templum. »
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."

traits.locale_text: « S'il me fallait résumer ce procédé à sa plus simple expression... la cellule galvanique ne fournit pas seulement la Force Motrice, mais me permet également de l'emmagasiner puis de la redistribuer là où la volonté de l'Omnimessie l’exige. Pour réveiller votre relique, par exemple, j'ai puisé de l'énergie de l'un des ateliers non essentiels d'Altar-Templum. »

languages.text: “请允许我提炼总结其最根本的精髓……原电池不仅释放源力，还允许我汲取能量，继而按照欧姆尼赛亚的意志重新分配至任何地方。例如，为唤醒您的圣物，我不得不从祭坛一处非关键小型车间中汲取能量。”
languages.original_text: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."
